sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 78:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 78:1
items.html: The root of the four phases is called the Keter of the ten Sefirot of direct light in the degree. Malchut in the degree is regarded as the Keter of the ten Sefirot of reflected light in the degree.
